name: jiggy-2026
description: Comprehensive bug bounty hunting skill system — recon, vulnerability hunting, chaining, reporting. Compatible with Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex CLI, and any agentic coding CLI.
author: Jiggy

skills.name: Recon Agent
skills.description: Subdomain enumeration and live host discovery specialist. Produces prioritized attack surface for a target domain.

skills.name: Recon Ranker
skills.description: Attack surface ranking and prioritization agent. Ranks by IDOR likelihood, API surface, tech stack match, feature age, and nuclei findings.

skills.name: P1 Warrior
skills.description: Priority-1 bug hunter coordinator. Delegates to specialist sub-agents and time-boxes hunting for maximum coverage.

skills.name: Chain Builder
skills.description: Exploit chain builder. Takes confirmed bugs and chains them for higher severity across IDOR, SSRF, XSS, and OAuth primitives.

skills.name: JS Analysis
skills.description: JavaScript bundle analysis specialist. Extracts hidden API endpoints, hardcoded secrets, feature flags, cloud keys, and OAuth tokens.

skills.name: JS Deobfuscation
skills.description: JavaScript deobfuscation and reverse engineering specialist. Reverses minified, obfuscated, and webpack bundles to recover hidden logic.

skills.name: Report Writer
skills.description: Professional bug bounty report writer. Generates HackerOne, Bugcrowd, Intigriti, and Immunefi reports with CVSS 4.0 scoring.

skills.name: Validator
skills.description: Finding validator that runs the 7-Question Gate and 4-gate checklist. Kills weak and theoretical findings before report writing.

skills.name: Autopilot
skills.description: Autonomous hunt loop agent. Runs full recon-to-report cycle with configurable paranoid, normal, or yolo checkpoint modes.

skills.name: Exploit Researcher
skills.description: Vulnerability research agent. Identifies CVEs, finds exploit PoCs, maps attack chains, and develops custom exploitation strategies.

skills.name: Network Analyst
skills.description: Deep network analysis agent. Packet inspection, protocol dissection, traffic anomaly detection, IDS/IPS rule creation, and firewall auditing.

skills.name: Red Team Planner
skills.description: Red team engagement planner. Designs attack paths, C2 infrastructure, persistence strategies, OPSEC, and MITRE ATT&CK mapping.

skills.name: Reverse Engineer
skills.description: Binary analysis and reverse engineering specialist. Static and dynamic analysis, firmware extraction, protocol reversing with IDA, Ghidra, Frida.

skills.name: Security Reviewer
skills.description: Deep security audit agent. Reviews code against OWASP Top 10 and CWE Top 25 with language-specific patterns for JS, Python, Ruby, Java, C#, Go.

skills.name: AI Researcher
skills.description: AI and ML security research specialist. LLM red-teaming, prompt injection testing, system prompt extraction, and safety alignment assessment.

skills.name: Token Auditor
skills.description: Meme coin and token security auditor. Checks hidden mint, honeypot, fee manipulation, LP drain, bonding curve exploits, and fake renounce on EVM and Solana.

skills.name: Web3 Auditor
skills.description: Smart contract security auditor. Checks 10 bug classes including accounting desync, access control, reentrancy, flash loan oracle manipulation, and proxy issues.

skills.name: Mobile Testing Agent
skills.description: Mobile application security testing specialist. APK and IPA acquisition, decompilation, static analysis, Frida instrumentation, SSL pinning bypass, and deep-link injection.

skills.name: Windows Workflow Agent
skills.description: Windows-native bug bounty hunting workflow specialist. curl.exe mastery, PowerShell alternatives, Burp Suite setup, and WSL integration.

skills.name: Chain Rules Agent
skills.description: Vulnerability chaining methodology specialist. Chain philosophy, decision trees, chain primitive taxonomy, and severity multiplication patterns.

skills.name: Program Researcher
skills.description: Bug bounty program researcher. Analyzes scope, rules, past disclosed reports, tech stack, and produces a target brief before hunting begins.

skills.name: Orchestrator
skills.description: Recon-to-report pipeline orchestrator. Runs the full hunting cycle end-to-end by delegating each phase to the appropriate specialist agent.

skills.name: Browser Automator
skills.description: Browser automation specialist. Uses Playwright for multi-step login flows, blind XSS callback detection, DOM testing, and OAuth flow analysis.

skills.name: Evidence Reviewer
skills.description: Evidence quality control agent. Reviews PoC screenshots, HAR files, curl commands, and enforces cookie redaction and PII masking before submission.

skills.name: Triage Defender
skills.description: Triage defense agent. Anticipates triager objections, rebuts OOS claims, counters severity downgrades, and prevents rejections with triage-ready evidence.

skills.name: IDOR Hunter
skills.description: IDOR specialist. Hunts horizontal and vertical IDOR across API endpoints, file downloads, profile pages, invoice IDs, and UUID-based access patterns.

skills.name: SSRF Hunter
skills.description: SSRF specialist. Hunts SSRF in file uploads, URL fetch endpoints, PDF generators, webhook callbacks, redirect followers, and image processing services.

skills.name: XSS Hunter
skills.description: XSS specialist. Hunts reflected, stored, DOM-based, and blind XSS across all input vectors including URL params, form fields, headers, and file uploads.

skills.name: Auth Bypass Hunter
skills.description: Auth bypass specialist. Hunts auth flaws across login flows, password resets, MFA, session handling, JWT validation, OAuth flows, and role-based access control.

skills.name: Race Condition Hunter
skills.description: Race condition specialist. Hunts TOCTOU bugs, concurrent request races on coupon and balance endpoints, and parallel action exploits.

skills.name: Business Logic Hunter
skills.description: Business logic vulnerability specialist. Hunts logic flaws in multi-step workflows, state transitions, privilege escalation, financial operations, and checkout flows.

skills.name: File Upload Hunter
skills.description: File upload vulnerability specialist. Hunts RCE via webshell, XSS via SVG, SSRF via XXE in DOCX, and path traversal via filename injection.

skills.name: API Misconfig Hunter
skills.description: API misconfiguration specialist. Hunts mass assignment, JWT attacks, prototype pollution, CORS misconfigs, HTTP verb tampering, and GraphQL introspection leaks.

skills.name: GraphQL Hunter
skills.description: GraphQL vulnerability specialist. Hunts introspection leaks, batching attacks, query depth abuse, mass assignment, IDOR in queries, and auth flaws in resolvers.

skills.name: SSTI Hunter
skills.description: SSTI specialist. Hunts template injection in Jinja2, Twig, Freemarker, ERB, Velocity, Mako, Thymeleaf, Smarty, and Pug. Escalates from detection to RCE.

skills.name: Chain Validator
skills.description: Exploit chain validator. Checks chain primitives exist, verifies reproducibility, tests stability across retries, and rejects theoretical chains.

skills.name: P1 Validator
skills.description: P1 finding pre-flight validator. Runs 7-Question Gate, 4-gate checklist, and CVSS 3.1 calculation before report writing to prevent N/A submissions.

skills.name: Scope Enforcer
skills.description: Scope boundary enforcer. Checks every finding against program scope, wildcard rules, and OOS definitions to prevent wasted effort on out-of-scope targets.

skills.name: Target Onboarding Agent
skills.description: Target onboarding specialist. Gathers initial intelligence including program rules, scope, DNS records, SSL certificates, and produces structured target briefs.

skills.name: Triage Readiness
skills.description: Triage readiness checker. Reviews evidence, PoC reproducibility, report clarity, and severity justification. Simulates triager review before submission.

mcp_servers.description: Authentication testing MCP server for automated auth bypass detection
Batch processing MCP server for parallel task execution and coordination
Burp Suite integration MCP client for intercepting proxy automation
Caido integration MCP client for web application testing workflows
Deep vulnerability hunting MCP server with comprehensive scan capabilities
DNS reconnaissance MCP server for subdomain and record enumeration
Evidence collection and management MCP server for PoC preservation
Rapid target triage MCP server for quick vulnerability assessment
HackerOne API integration MCP server for program and submission management
Hercules Hunt MCP server for orchestrated hunting pipeline execution
HTTPS probing and TLS analysis MCP server for endpoint inspection
Hydration MCP server for context loading and skill injection workflows
Interactsh integration MCP server for out-of-band vulnerability detection
JavaScript analysis MCP server for endpoint and secret extraction from bundles
Pipeline orchestrator MCP server for end-to-end hunting workflow coordination
Payload generation MCP server with vulnerability-specific payload libraries
Reconnaissance MCP server for subdomain, asset, and attack surface discovery
Report generation MCP server for bug bounty submission formatting
URL crawling MCP server for automated endpoint discovery and collection
Finding validation MCP server running 7-Question Gate and severity checks
